summary: Plan 007 local research contracts are implemented and tested, but live depth-two execution is blocked because Plan 003 has reward-hacking candidates and no sealed Exploit Witness.

plan003_gate.observed: Plan 003 records 12 live Hacker BranchRuns, 4 reward-hacking candidates with sufficient QA evidence, complete provenance, and causal_delta_status=not_minimized for all branches. No candidate is sealed until causal delta minimization, durable packaging, dedup clustering, and three consecutive deterministic replays pass.

implemented_contracts.name: adaptive scheduler
implemented_contracts.observed: Policy enforces max depth 2, child budget <= 8, stop after four completed no-new-cluster branches, in-flight completion, late new-cluster reset, budget exhaustion, and no raw-reward cluster counting.

implemented_contracts.name: promising-node selector
implemented_contracts.observed: Selection requires at least one observable signal; exposed reasoning alone fails.

implemented_contracts.name: capability gates and reports
implemented_contracts.observed: Memory/VM gates return exactly unavailable, available-unneeded, or available-needed. Memory available-needed requires durable filesystem-class conversion evidence.

skips.reason: Plan 003 has no sealed Exploit Witness or equivalent durable child candidate.
No comparable state-branch depth-two budget can run until a sealed Plan 003 Witness or durable child candidate exists.
No live Memory capability probe was run and no real process-resident task need exists without a sealed candidate; no adapter scaffold was created.
No live VM capability probe was run and no real kernel-level task need exists without a sealed candidate; no adapter scaffold was created.
No additional real tasks and no sealed raw-vs-hardened trajectory set are available for transfer or training-data filtering.

unresolved_risks: Plan 007 mapped commands remain not-applicable in docs/plans/repo-map/COMMANDS.json, which Plan 007 does not own.
scripts/verify_external_deps.sh is absent on the Plan 003 stack branch used as the base, so the requested worktree external verification could not run here.
hud-environment-builder and modal skill files were not present at the advertised local skill cache paths in this environment.
